description_long: This is a two-story house with a modern yet slightly traditional design, featuring a mix of light stone and dark panel exteriors. The house has a flat roof and is surrounded by a couple of large leafy trees, adding greenery to the urban setting. The windows are symmetrically arranged with black shutters, and there is a prominent balcony or terrace area on the upper floor. The ground floor includes a partially covered porch or entryway, with a black-and-white railing that adds contrast to the stone facade. The interior is partially visible, showing multiple rooms with modern furnishings and open layouts. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a balanced, orderly appearance.
description: A two-story house with a flat roof, stone and dark panel exteriors, symmetrical black-shuttered windows, and a prominent balcony, surrounded by leafy trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the balcony, upper floor rooms, and two large trees flanking the structure.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side view with a clear look at the stone facade, symmetrical windows with black shutters, and a single tree on the left.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the balcony, open porch, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the rear or side of the house, with a tree partially obscuring the view and a more solid dark panel wall with fewer windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a partially covered porch, black-and-white railing, and a simple modern door.
